subject: Mathematics
chapter: Pair of Linear Equations in Two Variables

key_points: Nature of solutions depends on ratios a₁/a₂, b₁/b₂ and c₁/c₂
Intersecting lines give a unique solution
Coincident lines indicate infinitely many solutions
Algebraic methods provide exact solutions compared to graphical method
formulas: Consistency conditions based on coefficient ratios
exam_tips: Check consistency conditions before solving fully
Graphical solutions are approximate; algebraic are exact
Cross-multiplication is useful for quick solving
Many HOTS questions test reasoning using coefficient ratios
